name: Dave Lex Minors Park
description: Brand new courts as of Aug 2024.  4 Pickleball and 1 tennis court.

name: Edgewater Paddle & Racquet
description: Edgewater Paddle & Racquet is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Great Falls, SC. There are 16 outdoor asphalt and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free. Reservations are available.
